page_content:
Formerly: PUAF698Q and PUAF783.

PLCY784 Disease, Disaster, and Development (3 Credits)

Studies development, the process by which needy people in fragile societies become self-sufficient people in resilient societies, in relation to disease and disaster, with particular attention to the developed world's response.

Credit Only Granted for. PUAF699D, PUAF784 or PLCY784.

Formerly: PUAF699D and PUAF784.
